source: BTD Mod Helper game data export

1.description: Piercing bombs shot from the tank can explode up to 3 times.

3.description: Armor Piercing Shells: Shots can pop Black Bloons and do extra damage to Ceramic Bloons. Duration increases as Churchill levels.

5.description: Adds a fast firing machine gun attack to the tank.

6.description: Binoculars allow Churchill to pop Camo Bloons.

7.description: Weapons deal more damage and shells can explode more times.

10.description: MOAB Barrage: Launches a barrage of shells at up to 10 MOAB-Class Bloons on screen, dealing massive damage each time.

12.description: Weapons get additional increased damage and shells can explode 6 times.

13.description: Armor Piercing Shells pop 3 layers of Bloon and do extra damage to Ceramic and higher. MOAB Barrage damage increased.

14.description: Main Gun can pop 3 additional layers and Machine Gun can pop 1 additional layer per shot.

15.description: All attacks do extra damage vs Camo, Lead, Fortified, and Stunned Bloons.

16.description: Armor Piercing Shells do even more damage. MOAB Barrage damage increased.

18.description: All shells pop 3 extra layers of Bloon and Machine Gun can pop 1 additional layer.

20.description: MOAB Barrage shells, Main Gun, and Machine Gun do massively increased damage per hit.
